title: fix: pass writable stream through workflow resume path

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: fix(workflows): pass writableStream parameter to workflow execution
fix(workflows): pass writable stream to workflow resume

relatedIssues.title: [DISCORD:1428490649078071407] Using writer in workflow step with agent

summary: Adds the missing `writableStream` parameter to the workflow resume execution path so resumed steps can emit streaming output chunks. A well-written community contribution with a clear description, changeset, and sequence diagrams from Greptile review. However, this exact fix was independently merged via PR #9139 (4 days after this PR opened) and further refined in PR #10720. The related issue #8956 is closed. The underlying code has since been significantly refactored and the `writableStream` parameter pattern no longer exists in the current workflow.ts.
maintainerNotes: This PR is fully superseded. PR #9139 merged the same fix on 2025-10-23 and PR #10720 further addressed writable stream passing on 2025-12-01. The referenced issue #8956 is closed. The workflow code has been heavily refactored since — `writableStream` as a parameter name no longer appears in workflow.ts. Should be closed with a thank-you to the contributor for the well-crafted fix.
